source.body_text_sample:
Cookies Consent
To provide the best experiences, we use technologies like cookies to store and/or access device information. Consenting to these technologies will allow us to process data such as browsing behavior or unique IDs on this site. Not consenting or withdrawing consent, may adversely affect certain features and functions.

Work at
MIRARCO
The opportunity to work on challenging & innovative applied research projects in partnership with both academia & industry.
Current Openings
MIRARCO is committed to attracting and developing Highly Qualified Personnel (HQP).

To apply with MIRARCO, please send your CV and cover letter to info@mirarco.org. Please indicate the specific job posting or your field of interest in the subject line

Click to accept marketing cookies and enable this content
Graduate Opportunities

Over 100 graduate students have worked at MIRARCO on multi-disciplinary, applied research. Students conduct research with outstanding Laurentian University faculty members in a wide range of engineering disciplines and can assess their interest in pursuing studies at the Masters and PhD level.

Internship Opportunities

At MIRARCO, interns are an integral part of our project teams. While working alongside engineers and researchers, you will gain valuable practical experience.

Cliff Fielding Building – Room CF203,
Laurentian University
935 Ramsey Lake Road,
Sudbury, Ontario, C
